text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's Valentine's Day, a day to gift friendship, love,
and gratitude to those special someones in the
form of chocolate.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer, do you have a minute?
choice_data_list: What's up?
What's up?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Nothing. It's just... Well, today's Valentine's Day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You've been looking out for me since my debut,
so... it's only polite to properly thank you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to give you something as thanks for all
the help you've given me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: It's from a famous store, so it should taste good.
choice_data_list: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
There you are, Dober! I had a feeling you would
be here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Bright?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I have a favor to ask. Could you teach me how to
make chocolates, please?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, that's why you can't warm up chocolate
directly in a pot.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so that's what the double boiler method is! I
shall remember this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... You shouldn't have waited until the day of
to come to me about this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: You're right. What a careless goose I am!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hang on. I know why we're here, but why are you making chocolates too, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Wait a second. You didn't have to go out of your
way to hang out with us, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It's more fun to make chocolates together, isn't
it?
choice_data_list:
I want to show my gratitude with chocolates
too.

I want to show my gratitude with chocolates
too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It's more fun to make chocolates together, isn't
it?
choice_data_list:
I want to show my gratitude with chocolates
too.

I want to show my gratitude with chocolates
too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Huh. So you have someone you want to thank
too...
choice_data_list: Do you want to know who they're for?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I guess that's fine, then... Are you making them
for the director or Tazuna or someone?
choice_data_list: Do you want to know who they're for?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
A-as if! Stop saying weird things and get back to
work!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That look... You're teasing me, aren't you? It's
fine. You don't have to tell me. Let's just get back
to work, okay?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I did it! Thanks, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I did it! Thanks, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You're welcome. You two did great.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Now all I have to do is give these to Ryan and the
others, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: But what?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I made too many pieces. Why don't we try some
of them now?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
We can trade the chocolates we made with each
other! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: H-hold on a sec!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'll just help myself to the pieces you two
made!
choice_data_list:
Is it okay if I have one of your chocolates,
Dober?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What?! Wait, I'm not emotionally prepared for
this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Um... Sure, if you'd like.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: No, wait! I mean... Agh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
They're not exactly store brand quality, so don't
expect too much.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Whatever! Have some if you'd like! I have no idea
if they taste any good, though!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I don't have anyone to give them to, so take as
many as you'd like.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her hesitation, Mejiro Dober's cheeks
turn faintly pink as she puts a piece of chocolate I
made in her mouth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think I'll give her the chocolates I made for her
later...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I was hoping to give some chocolates to both of
you before I gave any to Ryan and the others,
but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
There's someone else you'd both like to gift your
chocolates to first aside from me, yes?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I won't be so boorish as to ruin your moment. I
shall take my leave now! Do not mind my tears!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
W-wait a second. Was this your plan from the
beginning?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'll come back to give you your chocolates
later.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Urgh... Briiight!
choice_data_list: I guess it's just us now...
I guess it's just us now...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
D-don't say it like that! It makes me feel even
more—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You don't have to mind what Bright said earlier.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: More what? Ugh, I'm such an idiot!
choice_data_list:
Here, have something sweet to help you calm
down.

You're the one I want to give my chocolates to,
Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Your chocolates came out really well, Trainer. I'm
sure whoever you give them to will be happy to
receive them.
choice_data_list:
Here, have something sweet to help you calm
down.

You're the one I want to give my chocolates to,
Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Something sweet? Wait, do you mean like
chocolate?
choice_data_list: Happy Valentine's Day! Er, sorry they're so ugly.

They're not very pretty, but I put my feelings
into these.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: M-me?!
choice_data_list: Happy Valentine's Day! Er, sorry they're so ugly.

They're not very pretty, but I put my feelings
into these.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Wh-wh-wh—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
How are you able to do the things I can't so
easily?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm so pathetic... And here I'd tried to get away
with giving you store-bought chocolates.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: It's not fair...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Thanks. You're right. It's the feelings that count.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sigh. I feel like an idiot for trying to take the easy way out...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I know I've already given you some chocolates,
but will you accept these, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Take these. I'm only giving them to you because I
don't want to be the only one who gets
chocolates pushed on her, got it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
They're not as nice as store-bought chocolates,
but I did my best while making them.
